# Advance Cosmo Care Aesthetic & Wellness Clinic

> Doctor-led aesthetic, skin, laser and hair-restoration clinic with two locations in Aravalli, Gujarat — Modasa. Founded by Dr. Ankita Patel. Advanced, non-surgical treatments. Rated 5 ★ by 195 patients on Google.

## The Team & Doctors
- Dr. Ankita Patel (Founder & Lead Cosmetologist) — BHMS · Fellowship in Facial Aesthetics · Certified Cosmetologist & Laser Specialist · Trichologist. Specialises in advanced non-surgical facial rejuvenation, medical lasers, energy-based devices, and clinical hair restoration. Verified on Instagram (@advance_cosmocare) with 2.1K+ followers.

## Locations
- Shamlaji Road, Modasa: Advance Cosmo Care Clinic, block 3rd floor, city center, Mazum Dam, Advance cosmo care C, Socity, Modasa, Gujarat 383315 — Phone: +91 96645 27441
- Malpur Road, Modassa: Syaml icon, 24, Shamlaji road, Sahyog chokdi, Modasa, Aravalli 383315 — Phone: +91 96645 27441

## Contact & Booking
- WhatsApp (booking): +91 96645 27441
- Email: lasparklewellness@gmail.com
- Hours: Monday–Saturday, 10:00 AM–2:00 PM and 4:00 PM–8:00 PM. Closed 2–4 PM and on Sundays.
- Areas served: Modasa, Dhansura, Shamlaji, and the wider Aravalli region.

## Treatments
- Laser Hair Reduction (painless, all skin tones, face & body)
- Laser Toning (pigmentation, tan, even tone)
- HIFU & Skin Tightening (non-surgical lifting, energy-based)
- MNRF — Microneedling Radiofrequency (texture, pores, scars)
- Anti-Ageing & Facial Rejuvenation (non-surgical)
- Medical-Grade Facials
- Acne & Acne Scar Treatment
- PRP Hair Restoration (trichologist-led)
- Acupuncture (wellness)
- Hijama / Cupping Therapy (wellness)
